summary: REQ-19 is largely implemented in Navbar.tsx. The Elite Properties logo image is added before the company name using the correct image source, a gold gradient border ring, and appropriate sizing. Minor deviations exist: the company name color is '#0a0a0a' instead of the specified '#111111', and the company name is split into two styled lines rather than appearing as one unified 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' text block, with the subtitle rendered in gold rather than deep black.

missing_requirements.requirement: The company name text 'Elite Properties Real Estate Consultant' remains visible, deep black (#111111), bold, and to the right of the logo.
missing_requirements.reason: The company name is split into two separate elements: 'Elite Properties' in black (#0a0a0a instead of #111111) and 'Real Estate Consultant' styled in gold (text-gold-600), not deep black as specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Company name rendered as two-line stylized layout with 'Real Estate Consultant' as a gold-colored uppercase subtitle.
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement specifies the full company name as a single deep black bold text. Instead the implementation uses a two-line layout where the subtitle is gold-colored, which was not requested.
